name: JINS HOLDINGS Inc.
summary: JINS HOLDINGS Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the planning, production, distribution, and sale of eyewear and fashion accessories in Japan. It offers eyewear, such as eye glasses and lenses; and JINS MEME that enables visualization of the user's physical and mental state. The company also provides men's and women's accessories, including bags, hats, and other items; and engages in contracting business for agriculture works. It operates retail outlets in Japan, China, the United States, Taiwan, and Hong Kong. The company was formerly known as JINS Inc. and changed its name to JINS HOLDINGS Inc. in July 2019. JINS HOLDINGS Inc. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
